open_world_note: Absence of a claim is not evidence against it; only asserted edges are returned.

scores.overall_confidence_label: CONTESTED — suppressive score 3.60 vs. promoting score 3.60; see contradiction report

tumor_suppressive.label: Activation of OR51E2 (PSGR) by androstenone derivatives or beta-ionone inhibits …
tumor_suppressive.full_claim: Activation of OR51E2 (PSGR) by androstenone derivatives or beta-ionone inhibits proliferation of prostate cancer cells.
tumor_suppressive.source: Neuhaus EM, Zhang W, Gelis L, Deng Y, Noldus J, Hatt H (2009). "Activation of an olfactory receptor inhibits proliferation of prostate cancer cells." J Biol Chem 284(24):16218-16225.

tumor_suppressive.label: Inducible OR51E1/OR51E2 expression in LNCaP cells suppresses proliferation and p…
tumor_suppressive.full_claim: Inducible OR51E1/OR51E2 expression in LNCaP cells suppresses proliferation and promotes cell death; the paper explicitly flags field-wide controversy over whether beta-ionone is a genuine OR51E2 agonist.
tumor_suppressive.source: Pronin A, Slepak V (2021). "Ectopically expressed olfactory receptors OR51E1 and OR51E2 suppress proliferation and promote cell death in a prostate cancer cell line." J Biol Chem 296:100475.

tumor_suppressive.label: OR51E2 is upregulated in melanoma tissue and metastasis vs. normal melanocytes; …
tumor_suppressive.full_claim: OR51E2 is upregulated in melanoma tissue and metastasis vs. normal melanocytes; activation by beta-ionone inhibits proliferation of vertical-growth-phase (VGP) melanoma cells via apoptosis and reduces cell motility.
tumor_suppressive.source: Gelis L, Jovancevic N, Veitinger S, Mandal B, Arndt HD, Neuhaus EM, Hatt H (2017). "Functional expression of olfactory receptors in human primary melanoma and melanoma metastasis." Exp Dermatol 26(7):569-576.

tumor_promoting.label: Beta-ionone stimulation of PSGR/OR51E2 promotes LNCaP cell invasiveness; co-admi…
tumor_promoting.full_claim: Beta-ionone stimulation of PSGR/OR51E2 promotes LNCaP cell invasiveness; co-administration of alpha-ionone (a PSGR antagonist) abrogates this effect.
tumor_promoting.source: Sanz G, Leray I, Dewaele A, Sobilo J, Lerondel S, Bouet S, Grebert D, Monnerie R, Pajot-Augy E, Mir LM (2014). "Promotion of cancer cell invasiveness and metastasis emergence caused by olfactory receptor stimulation." PLoS ONE 9(1):e85110.

tumor_promoting.label: PSGR (OR51E2) overexpression drives premalignant prostate lesions and larger xen…
tumor_promoting.full_claim: PSGR (OR51E2) overexpression drives premalignant prostate lesions and larger xenograft tumors.
tumor_promoting.source: Rodriguez M, Luo W, Weng J, Zeng L, Yi Z, Siwko S, Liu M (2014). "PSGR promotes prostatic intraepithelial neoplasia and prostate cancer xenograft growth through NF-kappaB." Oncogenesis 3(8):e114.

tumor_promoting.label: OR51E2 is expressed in human retinal pigment epithelial (RPE) and choroid cells;…
tumor_promoting.full_claim: OR51E2 is expressed in human retinal pigment epithelial (RPE) and choroid cells; beta-ionone activation INCREASES RPE cell proliferation and migration (opposite direction from the cancer-tissue findings above).
tumor_promoting.source: Jovancevic N, Dendorfer A, Matzkies M, et al. (2017). "Medium-chain fatty acid derived receptor OR51E2 agonist beta-ionone regulates RPE cell migration and proliferation." Frontiers in Physiology.

tumor_promoting.label: Discloses 24 novel OR51E2 agonists (e.g. 19-OH AD, AFMK, glycyl-glycine, kojibio…
tumor_promoting.full_claim: Discloses 24 novel OR51E2 agonists (e.g. 19-OH AD, AFMK, glycyl-glycine, kojibiose, estriol, pelargonidin, palmitic acid) and 1 antagonist (13-cis retinoic acid/isotretinoin), claiming methods to treat/prevent castrate-resistant prostate cancer (CRPC) and diagnose prostate cancer via metabolite biomarkers, based on the premise that chronic agonist-driven OR51E2 activation drives neuroendocrine trans-differentiation.
tumor_promoting.source: US10588884B2, "Modulators of prostate-specific G-protein receptor (PSGR/OR51E2) and methods of using same" -- Duke University (Abaffy T, Matsunami H). Filed 2017-11-01, granted 2020-03-17.

tumor_promoting.label: Divisional continuation of US10588884B2 covering the same 24 agonists/1 antagoni…
tumor_promoting.full_claim: Divisional continuation of US10588884B2 covering the same 24 agonists/1 antagonist, expanding claims to metabolomic-profiling diagnostic methods and describing a proposed link between Propionibacterium acnes infection and prostate cancer progression via OR51E2 activation.
tumor_promoting.source: US12186294B2, "Modulators of prostate-specific g-protein receptor (PSGR/OR51E2) and methods of using same" -- Duke University (Abaffy T, Matsunami H). Divisional of US10588884B2 (Ser. No. 15/801,258, priority to provisional 62/415,591 filed 2016-11-01). Filed 2020-02-03, granted 2025-01-07, expires 2038-10-27.

neutral_or_context.label: Screened four candidate ligands (methylmalonic acid, 2,2-difluorocyclopropane-1-…
neutral_or_context.full_claim: Screened four candidate ligands (methylmalonic acid, 2,2-difluorocyclopropane-1-carboxylate, 3,3-difluoropropanoic acid, 4,4-difluoropentanoic acid) against a propionic acid positive control for OR51E2 activation, using a CREB-driven firefly luciferase / constitutive NanoLuc dual-reporter assay in transiently transfected HEK293 cells (pCI-OR51E2 + pGL4.53[luc2/PGK] + pCRE-Luc), at 0.5M and 1M ligand concentrations.
neutral_or_context.source: Bansal S, Gudisay S (2025). Dual-luciferase reporter assay data, unpublished (ISEF 2025 CBIO034T / ACSEF HS-BCOM-296-T2 / IFoRE 2025 project: "Allosteric Regulation of Ectopically Expressed Olfactory Receptors in Tumor Cells").

neutral_or_context.label: OR51E2 CNV gain/amplification observed across 45 TCGA projects, 1092 cases total…
neutral_or_context.full_claim: OR51E2 CNV gain/amplification observed across 45 TCGA projects, 1092 cases total. Top projects by case count: TCGA-BRCA (n=124), TCGA-LUAD (n=80), CPTAC-3 (n=70), TCGA-OV (n=65), TCGA-STAD (n=59).
neutral_or_context.source: GDC API cnvs endpoint, gene ENSG00000167332, live pull

neutral_or_context.label: TCGA-PRAD shows CNV gain/amplification for OR51E2 in 17 cases.
neutral_or_context.full_claim: TCGA-PRAD shows CNV gain/amplification for OR51E2 in 17 cases.
neutral_or_context.source: GDC API cnvs endpoint, gene ENSG00000167332, TCGA-PRAD cohort, live pull

neutral_or_context.label: TCGA-KICH shows CNV gain/amplification for OR51E2 in 10 cases. This is a small T…
neutral_or_context.full_claim: TCGA-KICH shows CNV gain/amplification for OR51E2 in 10 cases. This is a small TCGA cohort (~66 cases total), so this case count represents a comparatively high *frequency* even if smaller than large cohorts like TCGA-BRCA in absolute terms.
neutral_or_context.source: GDC API cnvs endpoint, gene ENSG00000167332, TCGA-KICH cohort, live pull

neutral_or_context.label: OR51E2 somatic mutations observed in 217 cases across 31 TCGA projects.
neutral_or_context.full_claim: OR51E2 somatic mutations observed in 217 cases across 31 TCGA projects.
neutral_or_context.source: GDC API ssms endpoint, gene ENSG00000167332, live pull

neutral_or_context.label: Solved structure of Human olfactory receptor OR51E2 bound to propionate in compl…
neutral_or_context.full_claim: Solved structure of Human olfactory receptor OR51E2 bound to propionate in complex with miniGs399, method=ELECTRON MICROSCOPY, resolution=3.1 A, released 2023-03-22. This is a structural cross-check only -- it does not itself make a claim about tumor direction/mechanism.
neutral_or_context.source: PDB 8F76 -- Billesbolle, C.B. et al. (2023). "Structural basis of odorant recognition by a human odorant receptor." Nature 615:742-749.

neutral_or_context.label: 144 bioactivity records in ChEMBL for OR51E2 (Olfactory receptor 51E2), spanning…
neutral_or_context.full_claim: 144 bioactivity records in ChEMBL for OR51E2 (Olfactory receptor 51E2), spanning 26 unique molecules and 25 EC50/IC50 potency measurements. Top assay types: Agonist activity at PSGR/OR51E2 (unknown origin) expressed in human Hana3A cells co-transfected with (n=24); Agonist activity at PSGR/OR51E2 (unknown origin) expressed in human Hana3A cells co-transfected with (n=24); Agonist activity at PSGR/OR51E2 in human LNCaP cells assessed as induction of change in extracellula (n=1).
neutral_or_context.source: ChEMBL target CHEMBL4523454 (Olfactory receptor 51E2), live API pull

tensions.divergence_hypothesis: CONFIRMED DIFFERENT ENDPOINTS: suppressive evidence measures proliferation; promoting evidence measures invasiveness, proliferation, tumor_growth. This is contested on overall clinical/therapeutic implication, but not a strict same-endpoint contradiction — both effects could be simultaneously true (e.g. reduced proliferation alongside increased invasiveness is a recognized cancer biology pattern). Do not present as a flat two-sided contradiction; present as divergent evidence on distinct outcomes. Additionally: Note from Neuhaus EM: Cross-checked against CLAUDE.md Section 6 table and the friend's (Bansal/Gudisay) Literature_Review.docx summary, which  | Note from Pronin A: Confirmed via PubMed/PMC (PMC8024707) and J Biol Chem fulltext -- ligand-specificity finding and explicit controversy st | Note from Jovancevic N: Sourced from the friend's Literature_Review.docx summary. Non-cancer tissue context, included because it is directly rel

Pronin A, Slepak V (2021). "Ectopically expressed olfactory receptors OR51E1 and OR51E2 suppress proliferation and promote cell death in a prostate cancer cell line." J Biol Chem 296:100475.
Inducible OR51E1/OR51E2 expression in LNCaP cells suppresses proliferation and p…
nodes.full_claim: Inducible OR51E1/OR51E2 expression in LNCaP cells suppresses proliferation and promotes cell death; the paper explicitly flags field-wide controversy over whether beta-ionone is a genuine OR51E2 agonist.
nodes.source: Pronin A, Slepak V (2021). "Ectopically expressed olfactory receptors OR51E1 and OR51E2 suppress proliferation and promote cell death in a prostate cancer cell line." J Biol Chem 296:100475.

melanoma
Human primary melanoma tissue and melanoma metastasis samples; cultured VGP melanoma cells

Gelis L, Jovancevic N, Veitinger S, Mandal B, Arndt HD, Neuhaus EM, Hatt H (2017). "Functional expression of olfactory receptors in human primary melanoma and melanoma metastasis." Exp Dermatol 26(7):569-576.
OR51E2 is upregulated in melanoma tissue and metastasis vs. normal melanocytes; …
nodes.full_claim: OR51E2 is upregulated in melanoma tissue and metastasis vs. normal melanocytes; activation by beta-ionone inhibits proliferation of vertical-growth-phase (VGP) melanoma cells via apoptosis and reduces cell motility.
nodes.source: Gelis L, Jovancevic N, Veitinger S, Mandal B, Arndt HD, Neuhaus EM, Hatt H (2017). "Functional expression of olfactory receptors in human primary melanoma and melanoma metastasis." Exp Dermatol 26(7):569-576.

unknown
RPE cells (non-cancer)
Jovancevic N, Dendorfer A, Matzkies M, et al. (2017). "Medium-chain fatty acid derived receptor OR51E2 agonist beta-ionone regulates RPE cell migration and proliferation." Frontiers in Physiology.
OR51E2 is expressed in human retinal pigment epithelial (RPE) and choroid cells;…
nodes.full_claim: OR51E2 is expressed in human retinal pigment epithelial (RPE) and choroid cells; beta-ionone activation INCREASES RPE cell proliferation and migration (opposite direction from the cancer-tissue findings above).
nodes.source: Jovancevic N, Dendorfer A, Matzkies M, et al. (2017). "Medium-chain fatty acid derived receptor OR51E2 agonist beta-ionone regulates RPE cell migration and proliferation." Frontiers in Physiology.

HEK293 cells, transient transfection (heterologous OR51E2 expression)

Bansal S, Gudisay S (2025). Dual-luciferase reporter assay data, unpublished (ISEF 2025 CBIO034T / ACSEF HS-BCOM-296-T2 / IFoRE 2025 project: "Allosteric Regulation of Ectopically Expressed Olfactory Receptors in Tumor Cells").
neutral
Screened four candidate ligands (methylmalonic acid, 2,2-difluorocyclopropane-1-…
nodes.full_claim: Screened four candidate ligands (methylmalonic acid, 2,2-difluorocyclopropane-1-carboxylate, 3,3-difluoropropanoic acid, 4,4-difluoropentanoic acid) against a propionic acid positive control for OR51E2 activation, using a CREB-driven firefly luciferase / constitutive NanoLuc dual-reporter assay in transiently transfected HEK293 cells (pCI-OR51E2 + pGL4.53[luc2/PGK] + pCRE-Luc), at 0.5M and 1M ligand concentrations.
nodes.source: Bansal S, Gudisay S (2025). Dual-luciferase reporter assay data, unpublished (ISEF 2025 CBIO034T / ACSEF HS-BCOM-296-T2 / IFoRE 2025 project: "Allosteric Regulation of Ectopically Expressed Olfactory Receptors in Tumor Cells").

nodes.label: CREB-driven firefly luciferase reports downstream GPCR/CREB
Patent disclosure (in vitro/in vivo data referenced in specification, not independently verified here)
US10588884B2, "Modulators of prostate-specific G-protein receptor (PSGR/OR51E2) and methods of using same" -- Duke University (Abaffy T, Matsunami H). Filed 2017-11-01, granted 2020-03-17.
Discloses 24 novel OR51E2 agonists (e.g. 19-OH AD, AFMK, glycyl-glycine, kojibio…
nodes.full_claim: Discloses 24 novel OR51E2 agonists (e.g. 19-OH AD, AFMK, glycyl-glycine, kojibiose, estriol, pelargonidin, palmitic acid) and 1 antagonist (13-cis retinoic acid/isotretinoin), claiming methods to treat/prevent castrate-resistant prostate cancer (CRPC) and diagnose prostate cancer via metabolite biomarkers, based on the premise that chronic agonist-driven OR51E2 activation drives neuroendocrine trans-differentiation.
nodes.source: US10588884B2, "Modulators of prostate-specific G-protein receptor (PSGR/OR51E2) and methods of using same" -- Duke University (Abaffy T, Matsunami H). Filed 2017-11-01, granted 2020-03-17.

No. 15/801,258, priority to provisional 62/415,591 filed 2016-11-01). Filed 2020-02-03, granted 2025-01-07, expires 2038-10-27.
Divisional continuation of US10588884B2 covering the same 24 agonists/1 antagoni…
nodes.full_claim: Divisional continuation of US10588884B2 covering the same 24 agonists/1 antagonist, expanding claims to metabolomic-profiling diagnostic methods and describing a proposed link between Propionibacterium acnes infection and prostate cancer progression via OR51E2 activation.
nodes.source: US12186294B2, "Modulators of prostate-specific g-protein receptor (PSGR/OR51E2) and methods of using same" -- Duke University (Abaffy T, Matsunami H). Divisional of US10588884B2 (Ser. No. 15/801,258, priority to provisional 62/415,591 filed 2016-11-01). Filed 2020-02-03, granted 2025-01-07, expires 2038-10-27.

Solved structure of Human olfactory receptor OR51E2 bound to propionate in compl…
nodes.full_claim: Solved structure of Human olfactory receptor OR51E2 bound to propionate in complex with miniGs399, method=ELECTRON MICROSCOPY, resolution=3.1 A, released 2023-03-22. This is a structural cross-check only -- it does not itself make a claim about tumor direction/mechanism.
